case_title: CALFOX INC. et al vs. GERAMONI, DRAKE DONOVAN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GERAMONI, DRAKE DONOVAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET STREET APT.# 2507 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,793.00 RENT, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,313.00, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTY FEES OF $520.00 GRANTED PER LEASE AGREEMENT. MONEY JUDGMENT OF $2,793.00 REPRESENTS PAST DUE RENT OF $1,100.00 AND DAILY DAMAGES OF $1,173.00.
